WorkflowDefinition.Name: WF_U009_Revetilations_frais
WorkflowDefinition.Description: Reventilations frais ligne factures APS451 Creation Date: 09/01/2026 Version: 1.2

FlowPart.Name: GetHead
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/APS450MI","operationRestPath":"/GetHead","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/APS450MI/GetHead","summary":"Get invoice batch head","httpMethod":"GET","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"INBN","literalValue":null,"name":"INBN","description":"Invoice batch number(10)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":true,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"DIVI","literalValue":null,"name":"DIVI","description":"Division(3)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"}],"output":[{"wfVariableName":"SUNO","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].SUNO","optional":false}],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":" ","ignore":true,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":[]}}

FlowPart.Name: GetBasicData_CRS620MI
